channel.title: Collaboration on Ben Selby
channel.description: Recent content in Collaboration on Ben Selby

item.title: Working with Zed for a week
item.description: I took Zed for a spin this week, and this post covers what I noticed whilst using it as my day-to-day editor. I love it, and I'm probably going to stay with it (but I miss a debugger). This is what Zed is: Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter. It’s also open source. Projects worked on: These are the projects I managed to work on this week with Zed:
